content:
# Glossifungites Ichnofacies

**Summary**: A specific ichnofacies characterized by burrows in firm or mud-dominated substrates.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] identified the Glossifungites ichnofacies as an indicator of surface-constrained heterogeneities.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] Serves as an indicator of surface-constrained discrete heterogeneities.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025]] identified through ichnological analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Burrows within this ichnofacies can form pathways for permeability in less permeable host rocks. ([[2025-refaat|Refaat, 2025, p. 36]])
